name.fr: Information de trafic à un IFR
name.it: Informazioni sul traffico a un IFR

metadata.description: Beispiel 4: Traffic advisory to an IFR flight with a spatial constraint (maintain south of the IGS axis). Demo fixture backing the mock-scenario voice loop (backend catalog id EX-04).
metadata.phraseologyStandard: ICAO Annex 10 Vol II / ICAO Doc 9432 (Manual of Radiotelephony)

disclosure.notice: Virtual-pilot voices are machine-generated (standard neural voices). Aircraft data is derived from a public live-flight feed. This scenario contains no personal data and MUST NOT be connected to live/operational ATC (CON-01, CON-03).

script.expectedAtcTransmission: NJE396J, opposite traffic 11 o'clock position 6 miles 4'900 feet climbing eastbound, maintain south of the IGS axis.
script.expectedReadBack: Looking out, maintaining south of the IGS axis, NJE396J.
script.exercises: Traffic advisory to IFR; spatial constraint read-back.
